name: deep-research
description: Source-triaged research engine with local-first evidence, grok-search freshness checks, Context7/API verification, tiered model pinning (sonnet/haiku agents for external research, parent model for synthesis), deep-fetch, content refinement, and flexible output: terminal, file, or skillwiki vault integration with schema-compatible follow-up queueing. v2.4.2: latest-by-default source triage, grok-search freshness, and Freshness & Verification Status reporting.
